operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO auth_update_payloads (payload_id, update_type, codec, layer, tl_bytes, payload_hash, expire_at) VALUES (:payload_id, :update_type, :codec, :layer, :tl_bytes, :payload_hash, :expire_at)

operation.name: SelectByPayloadId
operation.sql: SELECT payload_id, update_type, codec, layer, tl_bytes, payload_hash, expire_at FROM auth_update_payloads WHERE payload_id = :payload_id LIMIT 1
